pageContext.name: Dilophosaurus
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Dilophosaurus!  From the film Jurassic World Dominion, this Dilophosaurus Statue is a limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted Jurassic Park collectible.  Jurassic World Dominion fans, don't miss your chance to add the Dilophosaurus 1:10 Statue to your Jurassic Park collection!
